game_name: Tiny Toon Adventures: Buster's Hidden Treasure

element_introduction_order.element: Brainwashed friends (Plucky Duck, Hamton J. Pig, Dizzy Devil, Calamity Coyote)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Defeat mind-controlled allies to free them
Defeat bosses to progress narrative toward Montana Max
Locate Gogo Dodo to access portal and progress
Optional bonus levels with item collection challenges
Avoid touching Dodos while collecting items in bonus areas
Locate and defeat to rescue Babs Bunny and recover treasure

typical_relief_triggers: Entering Wackyland bonus portal (optional breather activity)
typical_tension_triggers: Wackyland item collection under Dodo threat (time pressure)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate with varied landscapes; tension builds through enemy encounters and boss fights, released by progression checkpoints and optional bonus exploration

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Rainbow-coloured logo portals indicate Wackyland bonus levels (optional content visually distinguished)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic platforming and simple enemy encounters establish core mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of brainwashed friends as encounters; varied landscapes (woods, snow) increase visual and environmental complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters with Roderick Rat and Gene Splicer; climactic confrontation with Montana Max
notable_spikes: Gene Splicer boss fight (mind-control helmet mechanic)

notable_level_patterns.description: Navigate through landscape while defeating foes, locate Gogo Dodo portal to progress; optional Wackyland portal available for skill-based bonus collection
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Woods level, Snow level (referenced in reviews)

notable_level_patterns.description: Timed item collection in optional portal area populated with Dodos; touch Dodo to exit; encourages risk-reward decision making
Defeat boss (Roderick Rat or Gene Splicer) to free brainwashed friend; friend falls in comedic fashion; helmet explodes
